headline: Congress heads back from July 4th recess in pro forma session mode as leadership preps next week's agenda.

senate.lastSessionSummary: The Senate convened briefly in pro forma session on Monday, July 6, meeting at 9:01 a.m. and adjourning at 9:02 a.m. No votes or business were conducted, establishing the quorum requirement while lawmakers remained on recess.

house.lastSessionSummary: The House met at 10:30 a.m. on Monday, July 6 and adjourned at 10:32 a.m. in pro forma session, introducing 11 new bills and 2 resolutions, with committee reports filed on H.R. 8481 regarding injunctions and H.J. Res. 1 on Supreme Court composition, but conducting no floor votes.
